explanation.uz: Metod obyekt orqali chaqirilganda (obj.getX()), `this` — o'sha obyekt (obj). Shuning uchun this.x = 10.
explanation.en: When a method is called via the object (obj.getX()), `this` refers to that object (obj). So this.x = 10.

explanation.uz: Arrow funksiya o'z `this` iga ega emas — u tashqi doiradagi `this` ni oladi (bu yerda counter). Shuning uchun forEach ichida this.count to'g'ri oshadi: 3.
explanation.en: An arrow function has no own `this` — it uses the enclosing `this` (here counter). So this.count increments correctly inside forEach: 3.

explanation.uz: `constructor` yangi obyektga name = "Dog" ni o'rnatadi. speak() metodi shu name'dan foydalanadi → "Dog makes a sound".
explanation.en: The `constructor` sets name = "Dog" on the new object. The speak() method uses that name → "Dog makes a sound".

explanation.uz: B klassi A dan meros oladi. B.greet() ichida `super.greet()` ota-klass metodini ("A") chaqiradi va "B" qo'shadi → "AB".
explanation.en: Class B inherits from A. Inside B.greet(), `super.greet()` calls the parent method ("A") and appends "B" → "AB".

explanation.uz: `instanceof` obyekt berilgan klass (konstruktor) nusxasi ekanini tekshiradi. c Cat'dan yaratilgani uchun true.
explanation.en: `instanceof` checks whether an object is an instance of the given class (constructor). c was created from Cat, so true.

explanation.uz: `prototype` ga qo'shilgan metod barcha nusxalar uchun umumiy bo'ladi. new Person("Ali") obyekti hello() ni prototipdan meros oladi → "Hi Ali".
explanation.en: A method added to `prototype` is shared by all instances. The new Person("Ali") object inherits hello() from the prototype → "Hi Ali".

explanation.uz: `Object.create(proto)` prototipi proto bo'lgan yangi obyekt yaratadi. obj'da greet yo'q, lekin u prototip zanjiri orqali proto.greet() ni topadi → "hello".
explanation.en: `Object.create(proto)` creates a new object whose prototype is proto. obj has no greet of its own, but finds proto.greet() via the prototype chain → "hello".

explanation.uz: `static` metod klass nusxasiga emas, klassning o'ziga tegishli. U to'g'ridan-to'g'ri MathHelper.square(4) orqali chaqiriladi → 16.
explanation.en: A `static` method belongs to the class itself, not to instances. It is called directly via MathHelper.square(4) → 16.

explanation.uz: `get area()` — getter: u xossa kabi (qavssiz) o'qiladi. new Circle(2).area → 3.14 × 2 × 2 = 12.56.
explanation.en: `get area()` is a getter: it is read like a property (without parentheses). new Circle(2).area → 3.14 × 2 × 2 = 12.56.

explanation.uz: `call(other)` funksiyani chaqirganda `this` ni other ga majburan bog'laydi. Shuning uchun this.x = other.x = 99.
explanation.en: `call(other)` invokes the function with `this` explicitly bound to other. So this.x = other.x = 99.
